title: Lucas's Mods
description: SMP-PVP Optimized Modpack made by Lucassmaps
body:
# Lucas's Mods
*This modpack is focused about PVP,Survivals and Optimization of Regular Minecraft*
In this modpack you can find mods about pvp-optimizers
*so check if they are allowed before joining the server ( eg : Marlow's Crystal Optimizer or Hero's Anchor Optimizer ) bc you could get easily banned*
